title: Investment Thesis
rationale: Lead with the core re-rating story before getting into financials.

blocks.content: We initiate with a BUY view. The franchise is migrating from cyclical broking revenue to an annuity-driven mix. ARR is now 65% of net revenues, structurally improving the quality of earnings. The market has not yet priced this shift, leaving a 37% upside to consensus.

items: Annuity revenue mix shift de-risks the earnings base across cycles.
AUM compounding above 30% YoY with category-leading benchmark outperformance.
Operating leverage from a largely fixed cost base supports margin expansion.
AA+ credit upgrade endorses balance-sheet strength and reinvestment capacity.
Probability-weighted target reflects a balanced view across regulatory scenarios.
